title: RequirementResult
description: RequirementResult: Object representing result of verification of an object against a Requirement.

VerificationResult.description: Result of object verification against the condition specified in the Requirement. IConditionResult: Top interface for all condition results.

Events.description: List of events that occurred during the verification process.

_bhomVersion.description: Optional version of BHoM used as part of automatic versioning and schema upgrades.
